item.sable_tournament.six_way_thruster.t: Provides thrust in all six directions (+/-X, +/-Y, +/-Z)
Redstone signal strength controls thrust power. Configurable via NBT parameters
item.sable_tournament.six_way_spinner.to: Generates torque in both directions around X, Y, Z axis
Redstone signal strength controls torque magnitude. Configurable via NBT parameters
item.sable_tournament.tournament_flap.to: Creates drag force based on orientation and airflow
Configurable drag coefficient via NBT. Must be placed perpendicular to airflow
item.sable_tournament.gyro.tooltip2: Automatic stabilization for helicopters and drones
item.sable_tournament.gyro.tooltip3: Redstone signal strength on top controls stabilization power
